message:
chore(beads): flush conformance expansion + fuzz target tasks

Syncs the local SQLite issue DB to JSONL after the search.h parity,
locale/pthread/allocator/elf differential conformance rollout and the
two new fuzz targets:

  * bd-r2oq  — search.h conformance (hsearch/tsearch/lsearch families).
  * bd-9chy.*  — remaining stdio epic subtasks closed by this cycle.
  * bd-wzud  — fuzz_locale target (registered, corpus seeded).
  * bd-hnec  — fuzz_elf_loader target (registered, corpus seeded).
  * Metadata updates on pthread-mutex / pthread-cond / allocator /
    locale / elf-loader conformance beads, all now backed by the
    matching `*_conformance_test.rs` harness in
    crates/frankenlibc-harness/tests/.

Pure `br sync --flush-only` output — no code change in this commit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
